data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Easy navigation by minimizing the number of choices presented at any given time.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs for quick accessibility to frequently used controls.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable buttons and touches targets.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Ensures content is organized into chunks that are easy to digest.
data.technical_spec: Clear headings, listed content, and intuitive groupings.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Emphasizes pleasing design to make interfaces appear easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Consistent style, coherent color schemes, Apple’s design language.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Focuses on creating memorable moments within the user journey.
